Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor
Off Calendar May-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order

Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar May-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Michael Miller, Esq. and David Jung, Esq. for Petitioner: Cindy Wong, present as Guardian at litem for: Kenderick Zhang and Nathan Zhang, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petitions are granted and compromise for each minor is approved.
Attorney's Fees $5,000.00
The remaining proceeds of $15,000.00 to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Exhibit " A".
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Apr-13-2006 Continued To May-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
David Jung and Michael Miller, Esq. for Petitioner: Cindy Wong, present as Guardian at litem for: Nathan Zhang and Kendrick Zhang, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
Matter was continued to May 2, 2006, for Petitioner to file separate petitions for each minor.
